title: helictotrichon × altius
intro: Helictotrichon × altius, also known as a hybrid ornamental grass, is a cross between Helictotrichon sempervirens and H. sanguineum, combining the desirable traits of both parent species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Helictotrichon × altius include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
